comment.body:
Bull case yes.
Bear case: they'll front-run a run up in price before the supposed rate cut on Sept 17, and dump after it. 
***Watch Jackson Hole  summit/conference Aug 21-23 for signs which way Fed Rate cut decision will go. **

Always know both the bull case and bear case reasons, n play the chart
